theme.style: Deep Australian wine country mood built on forest-green darkness, warm burgundy richness, and harvest-gold warmth. Backgrounds draw from organic flowing forms, earthy textures, and cinematic directional lighting that evoke the drama of late-afternoon sun over vine rows. The palette stays grounded and premium — never garish — with a confident rurality that speaks directly to professional grape growers.

slides.label: Vineyard Details
slides.backgroundPrompt: Abstract 3D rendered environment featuring broad sweeping ribbons of deep forest-green silk arcing from the lower-left corner upward, interwoven with deep burgundy and oxblood curves that twist through the mid-frame with organic tension, warm harvest-gold light spilling from the lower-right edge and casting long soft shadows across layered translucent surfaces. The upper 30% fades into calm, near-black forest-green darkness ideal for headline readability, while the lower regions carry rich earthy texture with subtle grain, volumetric amber glow, and depth-of-field blur softening the edges. 8K quality, ultra smooth gradients, premium feel, no text, no letters, no UI elements, no device mockups.
